suite.name: Shop

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.msg: Directory 'C:\Users\Lenovo\PycharmProjects\Wipro-Training-2026\Capstone Project\Capstone Project\robot framework\screenshots\Robot screenshots' already exists.
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.msg: Directory 'C:\Users\Lenovo\PycharmProjects\Wipro-Training-2026\Capstone Project\Capstone Project\robot framework\reports' already exists.
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Open Stealth Browser
kw.doc: Open a browser for Robot tests.

kw.name: Create File
kw.msg: Created file 'C:\Users\Lenovo\PycharmProjects\Wipro-Training-2026\Capstone Project\Capstone Project\robot framework\reports\robot_terminal_output.txt'.
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Recover Browser If Needed
kw.doc: Check if the browser session is alive. If not, reopen it.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Source
kw.doc: Returns the entire HTML source of the current page or frame.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Registration might have failed. Page source captured for debugging.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Pass Execution If
kw.doc: Conditionally skips rest of the current test, setup, or teardown with PASS status.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Registration did not complete. Check screenshots for CAPTCHA or other blockers.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.doc: Check if the browser session is alive. If not, reopen it.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Recover Browser If Needed
kw.doc: Check if the browser session is alive. If not, reopen it.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

Element Should Be Visible

kw.name: Get Variable Value
kw.doc: Returns variable value or ``default`` if the variable does not exist.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

suite.doc: Runs 25 Test Cases in a single browser session per CSV file.
